sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71008" key="nomofulakiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νομοφῠλᾰκ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n71008.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">observant of law,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γένος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:11p.440M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11p.440M.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ν. ἐπιστήμη</foreign> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
